[Brother Branham leaves the microphone to pray for the sick, many of his words are indiscernible—Ed.]
Satan, I condemn the…you, in the Name of Jesus Christ, to leave the baby. Leave it, come out of this child; go, and the baby be well.
I lay my hands upon my brother, in the Name of Jesus Christ, and condemn the affliction of his body. Amen. In the Name of Jesus Christ, give her her request.
Lord, in the Name of Jesus Christ, give Sister Ruth her healing. Amen.

I’ll pray for the baby. But I—I come down from that pulpit… Where do you live? [The sister says, “Bloomington.”—Ed.] Bloomington, Indiana? Write me a letter about this baby. Swelled all out in the stomach here now. Are you going to believe, lady, that it’s right? [“I believe it’s right.”]
Then, Father, I lay my hands on the…this baby, and condemn this devil. Depart from the baby. And may the…?…May it now be normal and the baby be healed. You write me a letter, in a couple days.
See that little cross-eyed baby laying there? If you’ll not doubt no more, you will bring that baby back and show it to be normal and well.
I lay hands upon this sister. And may she have the attitude of the Syrophenician woman. And may she be healed in Jesus Christ’s Name…?… Let the heart be well, in the Name of Jesus Christ.

I speak these words. It has to be well. It can’t be anything else. Jesus said, “I can, if you’ll believe.” Now, if He can make a squirrel appear right like that, like He did the ram one time, He can make that heart appear normal and well. It has to be. In the Name of Jesus Christ, let the heart be well. Grant it.
Now, isn’t that simple? It is simple. God is so simple, we run over the top of it. Now you just be simple enough not to even think about it anymore. It’ll be all right.
Lord, let our sister be well, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Amen. Sister…?…

Lord, now I’ve said these words, honestly as I can confess before the people. I’ve told them, “If you say unto this mountain, ‘Be moved,’ and don’t doubt, you can have what you’ve said.” In the Name of Jesus Christ, may this affliction be removed, and all your troubles that you have. Don’t doubt now. Go right close to Him now.
Lord, I lay my hands upon this little one with this terrible headache. In the Name of Jesus Christ, may it be healed. Amen.
Lord, in the Name of Jesus Christ, let that mountain move from him, may it be healed. May our brother now be made whole, for the Kingdom of God’s sake. Amen.

Deaf and dumb; deaf mute. Lord, in the Name of Jesus Christ! I’ve stood and preached day after day, and year after year, I’ve never seen faith come in contact with You, in all my life, but what there was something happened! Now, he is deaf in his ear, and ruptured in his stomach. Let him be healed, in Jesus Christ’s Name. Amen. Now, don’t doubt.
Lord, You know the afflictions of his body. With hands upon him, with a sincere heart, let him be healed, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Amen.
Death lays at one door, faith at the next. God, roll away the stone and let faith take over. May the cancer leave her, in the Name of Jesus Christ.
Lord, may he be healed. I lay hands upon him. The Message is still ringing through the walls. In the Name of Jesus Christ, may he be healed.
Father God, I lay hands upon my brother. Let it be, Lord, Thy Spirit and power, to give him his request. Let it be, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Amen. It’s finished. Don’t doubt it now.
Lord, our brother’s desire is to come into Thy Presence, with this condition upon him. Now, in the Name of Jesus Christ, let him have what he is asking for. Amen.
What a great thing! Let the Holy Ghost come on this child, for the glory of God that they might bring him up unto his…?…For the Kingdom of God’s sake, may he receive it. Amen.
Father, in the Name of Jesus Christ, let it be so, that our sister gets healed, and her request granted, in Jesus’ Name. Amen.

May it be done. You will receive the Holy Ghost. There is no way to keep you from…?…You’ve got to! You’ve got to receive It, ’cause God said so. You stand by It. Just break through that little crust there. Just say…?…
Heavenly Father, in the Name of Jesus Christ, grant our sister’s request. Amen.
Father, in the Name of Jesus Christ, grant the request of our sister. May she be healed. Amen.
He can make a squirrel come into existence, seven straight times. He’d give that woman anything she asked for; He’d give it to you…?…
Lord, in the Name of Jesus Christ, grant the request of our sister. It’s Your Word. Thank You. And may it be granted to her, Father, through Jesus Christ. Amen.
Your loved ones? Father, in the Name of Jesus Christ, grant these…?…
Lord, this little Jewish woman…Thou art the God of Abraham. Grant it, in the Name of Jesus Christ, her request. So be it!
In the Name of Jesus Christ, God of Heaven, grant her request. Amen.
This little girl. Just as you come on the platform there, God was telling me all about your life. He’ll take that nervousness from you.
Lord, I condemn the nervousness in this girl. May it leave her this hour and she walk out of here so happy. It shall be, in Jesus Christ’s Name.
God of Heaven, Who raised up Your Son, Jesus, in the resurrection we celebrate, may she celebrate it greater today…?…In Jesus’ Name. Amen.
In the Name of Jesus Christ, God’s Son, I lay hands upon my sister, asking that she may be healed now in the Name of Jesus.
In the Name of the Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of God, may our sister be healed. Amen. It can’t keep her. It’s got to leave. Go, this just has to leave.

Lord, in the Name of Jesus Christ, may our sister be healed. Amen. In the Name of Jesus Christ, I heal this, my sister. Amen. In the Name of Jesus Christ, I heal my sister. Amen. In the Name of Jesus Christ, I heal my sister. In the Name of Jesus Christ, I heal this, my sister. In the Name of Jesus Christ, I give her her request. Amen.
Lord, in the Name of Jesus Christ, I give this little mother her request. In the Name of Jesus Christ, I give her her request, Lord. Lord, in the Name of Jesus Christ, I give her her request.
Satan, I cast you out. In the Name of Jesus Christ, leave the woman.
Had you bound a long time. You’re free now. You’re going to be well. It’ll be all right now, then. Believe it now.
God, in the Name of Jesus Christ, I give this sister, who is crippled, her healing. Amen.
In the Name of Jesus Christ, I give this sister her healing. Amen.
In the Name of Jesus Christ, sister, I give you your healing. Amen. So be it!
I trust to God I’m not making a mistake. Grant this, by faith. So be it!

Do you believe God gives you the strength to heal your heart trouble, too? Do you believe that story that I just told? With all your heart? Then I give you your healing. In the Name of Jesus Christ, I give you your healing.
What’s this woman’s name that just went back here? Do you live around here somewhere? [The sister says, “Yes.”—Ed.] You remember that you are healed! That’s just as true as I’m standing here.
Father, in Jesus Christ’s Name, grant this, I pray, her healing. Amen.
Father, in the Name of Jesus Christ, may she have her healing. Amen!
I—I—I pronounce you…I—I—I…By the grace of God, through a Divine gift, I give you your healing! Cast away that devil, too.
You believe Sister Rose? O Lord, Creator of heavens and earth, give this Sister Rose Austin this healing, Lord, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Amen. That’s it, Sister Rose, go believing now.
Lord, give to our sister her healing, in Jesus Christ’s Name. Amen…?…
Do you believe that? You believe every bit of it. Then I give you, in Jesus’ Name, your request. God will make her well.
May it be so, Lord, that her brother will be healed, physically and spiritually, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Amen! May this be the hour that when…?…

Lord, I lay hands upon her, when she is perfectly hopeless, to the doctors or any cure from medical science. But not from meeting the resurrected Christ. In the Name of Jesus, may she be healed. Amen. …?…

Lord, give to our sister, listening close to her request, watching every word she said. It’s for the Kingdom’s sake. I pray that You will grant it to her, in Jesus’ Name. Amen. [A sister speaks to Brother Branham—Ed.]…?…
Lord, as Your servant, listening to that mother cry for her baby, I condemn the devil that’s did this.

And upon the woman’s confession of faith, I cast away this devil. You’ll not be able to cripple this child. Be healed in Jesus’ Name. Amen. She’s just being healed, sister. Just don’t doubt it, a bit. God bless you, brother. That’s your baby? May he receive the Holy Ghost!
Won’t you take the baby somewhere and listen to it just a few minutes. I believe something has happened to the baby. You’ll receive it. Do you believe that?
In the Name of Jesus Christ may our brother receive his healing.
Lord, may the Power of Almighty God condemn the affliction of his body, and fill him with the Holy Ghost. This is the hour and the time. In Jesus Christ’s Name, I give It to him. Amen.
Sugar gone. You received the Holy Ghost. How long you been afflicted…?…All your life. Do you believe that Christ will make you well and deliver you from this affliction; make you normal?

Your child? Your—your foot. You just come alone? If I had, if— if I had the strength within myself, see! But I believe that God will help me have faith for it. I’ll do everything that’s in my power. Do you believe me? Do you believe that story about those squirrels? You do? You believe that it’s possible, that this morning, that God could heal your body, and you walk again, walk like you ought to have the first time? There is something just happened through your birth there, there is something that’s interrupted something a bit and you just didn’t grow right. Just like a limb growing over another limb, it holding it down. Well, if that limb can come off that limb, it’ll get straightened out and be right. See? Is that right? It’s a curse. It’s a curse. If the curse could leave, then you’ll get well. See?
Lord, I am thinking, what if this was my child, what if this was my brother? By faith, I remove the curse, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Amen.
Lord, I lay my hands upon him and ask for his healing, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Amen.
Father God, in the Name of Jesus Christ, I lay hands on this suffering woman, for her healing. Amen. Sister Nash, God saved you from a cancer, some years ago.
Lord, give Sister Nash her request. As Your servant, I ask it. It shall be done. That’s the answer, Sister Nash. In the Name of Jesus Christ, give our sister her request. Amen.

[A brother and sister speak with Brother Branham—Ed.] Thank you, brother, and go back to your people that were there. May God grant it. Such a wonderful time, your people rallied around when I was there. You was at Bombay when we were there? Well, then you believe these things that I…you’ve heard?
Lord, as he goes back to his peoples across the sea, may he go filled with the Power of God, healed in every request that he is asking. May he go and receive it, in Jesus Christ’s Name. Amen.
In the Name of Jesus Christ, the Son of God, may our sister receive her request.
Lord, grant the request of our sister. May her trouble be ceased right now, by the resurrection through Jesus Christ. Amen. Sister, it has to be, just has to be!
[A sister speaks with Brother Branham—Ed.] You want this repeated in the Gospel? [“Yes.”]

Lord God, as this young woman stands here, not for any selfish motives. She is praying for her brother, has infection in his blood. I give her her request. By a commission given me by an Angel; and by a vision of Jesus Christ, a few weeks ago, in my room; I give this girl her request. Amen.
It has to be. You live near here? [The sister says, “Memphis, Tennessee.”—Ed.] Memphis, Tennessee. Write me a letter. You’ll— you’ll—you’ll have your request.
Brother Grimsley. [The brother speaks with Brother Branham—Ed.] God bless you, Brother Grimsley.

Lord, we can remember how far this brother has come, and the pit that he was hewed from. He wants more of Your Spirit, Lord. This I give him, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Seeing his back works, that he has tried to follow You, then, by the Power of a—a commission given to me by Jesus Christ, confirmed by an Angel and a vision, I give Brother Grimsley his desire.
